global_description: A slender, medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and pointed wings. It has a predominantly white body with a light gray back and wings, a black cap on its head, and a sharp, red-orange bill. The tail is deeply forked and white, adding to its elegant appearance.

part_details.head: Black cap covering the top, contrasting with white cheeks and throat.
part_details.bill: Long, slender, and pointed, colored red-orange.
part_details.wings: Long and narrow, light gray with white undersides.
part_details.tail: Deeply forked, white, creating a distinctive split appearance.
part_details.body: Predominantly white with a light gray back, sleek and aerodynamic.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head, extending to the nape.
The red-orange bill protrudes from the front of the face.
The light gray wings extend laterally from the body.
The deeply forked tail extends from the rear of the body.
